case_title: ANTOINE BELL VS. CHENYANG LEI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, ANTOINE AS TO DEFENDANT LEI, CHENYANG DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-27-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-25-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-05-2016
SUMMONS ISSUED ON COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF BELL, ANTOINE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-18-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-07-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-18-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AMENDED CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, ANTOINE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-27-2016 CONTINUED TO SEP-07-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
